'''Dillian Pressor''' was one of the crewmen of ''[[Outbound Flight]]''. His wife, their daughter [[Katarin Pressor|Katarin]], and their son [[Jorad Pressor|Jorad]] accompanied him on the flight.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

He survived the crash of ''Outbound Flight'' on the planet known to the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] as [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], an event he was able to foretell due to his latent [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]]. Even moments after the crash it attracted the suspicion of [[Chas Uliar]]. In the Redoubt, his daughter [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory|Rosemari Pressor]] gave birth to his granddaughter [[Evlyn Tabory]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
